name: manage_campaigns
description: Create, update, pause, or delete advertising campaigns on X (Twitter). Each campaign has an objective (awareness, engagement, conversions), a budget, a funding instrument, and start/end dates. Campaigns contain line items which hold the actual ads.

parameters.name: funding_instrument_id
parameters.description: The funding instrument (payment method) ID to bill against.

parameters.name: daily_budget_amount_local_micro
parameters.description: Daily budget in micros of the account currency (e.g., 5000000 = $5.00 USD).

parameters.name: entity_status
parameters.description: Campaign status. Options: ACTIVE, PAUSED, DRAFT.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the campaign should start.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the campaign should end.
